title: FsList
description: fs.list — directory entries (name, kind, size, mtime). Non-recursive; the FE expands one level at a time via repeat fs.list calls. Hidden files (leading '.') are included by default — they matter in an IDE.

path.description: Workspace-relative directory path. '.' lists the workspace root. Daemon rejects absolute paths and any path escaping the workspace root.

name.description: Basename only — no path separator. The caller joins to its working path.

kind.description: POSIX d_type equivalent. Other kinds (block/char/socket/fifo) are not surfaced in v1; the daemon coalesces them to 'file' so the FE doesn't crash on them.

size.description: Byte length. Meaningful for kind=file; 0 for dir/symlink in v1.

path.description: Echo of the request path, normalized.

entries.description: Entries in the directory, sorted by name (case-sensitive, locale-independent).
